title: Communauté de communes du canton de Combles
summary: The communauté de communes du canton de Combles  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie region of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Haute Somme in 2013.
text:
The communauté de communes du canton de Combles  is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the  Picardie region of France. It was created in December 1993. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Haute Somme in 2013.

Composition
This Communauté de communes comprised 19 communes:
